layout.authTitle: A clean operational layer for sales, products, payments, and contracts.
layout.authDescription: Built to feel like a real SaaS product from day one, with onboarding, workspace awareness, and room to grow.

landing.title: Run sales, clients, products, payments, and contracts from one elegant workspace.
landing.description: BusinessHub gives growing companies a flat, clean, multi-tenant foundation designed for real SaaS expansion from day one.
landing.previewNote: Workspace-aware routing, onboarding placeholders, and clean modular screens are already wired.
landing.featureTenantDescription: Keep each workspace cleanly separated and ready for multi-branch growth.
landing.featureRevenueDescription: Lay the groundwork for invoices, payments, and customer lifecycle management.
landing.featureVisibilityDescription: Use structured dashboards and activity streams to support daily execution.
landing.featureSecurityDescription: Prepare for role-based access, workspace onboarding, and protected app routes.
landing.footerPrimary: BusinessHub SaaS foundation for business operations.
landing.footerSecondary: Responsive, flat, and ready for Supabase integration.

auth.loginDescription: Sign in to continue managing your workspace, team access, and daily operations.
auth.loginHelper: Sign in with your Supabase email/password account to continue into your workspace.
auth.signupDescription: Start with a clean SaaS-ready foundation and set up your company in a few simple steps.
auth.forgotDescription: This screen is ready for Supabase recovery flow wiring when backend auth is enabled.

messages.loginError: Unable to sign in with those credentials.
messages.signupError: Unable to create your account right now.
messages.signupSuccess: Account created. Check your email to confirm your address before signing in.
messages.forgotError: Unable to send a reset link right now.
messages.forgotSuccess: Password reset instructions were sent if that email exists in the system.

onboarding.sideDescription: Add the essentials now so the app can route users into the right tenant context later.
onboarding.formDescription: Simple now, extensible later for branches, tax profiles, and team invites.

messages.error: Unable to create your workspace right now.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: A calm operational overview for your workspace with room for future KPIs, cash flow, and team-specific insights.
dashboard.heroTitle: Your workspace {name} is ready for structured growth.
dashboard.heroDescription: This dashboard is prepared for real SaaS expansion with workspace-aware routing, activity streams, and modular feature areas.

checklistItems.auth: Auth context and session loading wired

quickActions.createInvoiceDescription: Issue a new sales invoice for a client.
quickActions.addProductDescription: Register a sellable item with pricing.

launcher.tileDescription: Open this section and continue working.
launcher.welcomeDescription: Your main sections are ready in a calm, focused surface that helps you get started without visual noise.
launcher.primaryTile: Open the main workspace and start from the central area.
launcher.secondaryTile: Jump straight into the section and continue working.
launcher.searchDescription: A future-ready area for searching clients, invoices, and products.
launcher.settingsDescription: Fast access to preferences and general configuration.

partners.title: Partners
partners.description: Manage customers, suppliers, and strategic partners across your workspace with clean segmentation placeholders.
partners.emptyDescription: Start building your relationship graph with clients, suppliers, or external business partners.

products.title: Products
products.description: Prepare your catalog foundation with product placeholders, pricing structure, and searchable listings.
products.emptyDescription: Add your first product so invoicing, pricing, and sales workflows have a clean data starting point.
products.workspacePlaceholder: Choose an area from the menu to start managing product data.

categories.title: Product categories
categories.description: Manage categories connected to the current workspace.
categories.emptyDescription: Categories added to the product table will appear here automatically.

pos.title: Point of Sale
pos.description: A fast daily sales surface, ready to connect products, customers, and instant payments later.
pos.emptyDescription: Prepare products and categories so the live selling experience can appear here.

invoices.title: Sales Invoices
invoices.description: Keep invoice workflows structured with clean states for creation, review, and collection.
invoices.emptyDescription: Issue your first sales invoice to begin tracking billing activity inside the workspace.

payments.title: Payments
payments.description: Track settlements, outstanding balances, and incoming cash flow with an extensible payments surface.
payments.emptyDescription: Once invoices start getting settled, recorded payments will appear here for reconciliation flows later.

contracts.title: Contracts
contracts.description: Organize client agreements, renewals, and commercial commitments in one extendable contract area.
contracts.emptyDescription: Prepare long-term customer or supplier relationships by storing the first contract entry here.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: A dedicated place for workspace-level preferences, access control, and future business configuration.

panels.profileDescription: Branding, legal business details, and operational defaults.
panels.accessDescription: Permission modeling placeholder for teams, branches, and roles.
panels.teamDescription: Create employee accounts, assign roles, and track access status for the current company.
panels.placeholder: Configuration placeholder ready for deeper workspace settings.

team.title: Team Management
team.description: Manage company users, create employee accounts, and assign operational roles from one place.
team.listDescription: All accounts linked to the current tenant appear here with role and status.
team.emptyDescription: Add the first employee to provision a login inside the current company.

financialProfile.title: User financial profile
financialProfile.description: The internal Partner record linked to this company user.

form.title: Add new employee
form.description: Create an employee account inside the current company and assign the initial password and role.

validation.required: Please fill in all required fields.
validation.passwordLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.

messages.createError: Unable to create the employee right now.
messages.createSuccess: Employee created successfully and the account is now active.
messages.ownerOnly: Only the company owner can add employees in this phase.
messages.financialProfileCreateSuccess: The financial profile was created and linked to the user.
messages.financialProfileCreateError: Unable to create the user's financial profile.
messages.financialProfilesBulkError: Unable to create financial profiles for unlinked users.
messages.financialProfileLoadError: Unable to load the financial profile.
messages.financialProfileNotFound: The linked financial profile was not found.

locations.title: POS locations
locations.description: Manage POS configurations connected to this workspace.

sessions.emptyDescription: When a shift or session is opened for this POS, it will appear here.

sessionForm.openDescription: Open a new work session for {name}.
sessionForm.openDescriptionFallback: Open a new work session for this POS.
sessionForm.closeDescription: Enter the actual closing balance to calculate the difference before closing.
sessionForm.notePlaceholder: Add an optional note for the start of the shift

sale.title: Sales screen
sale.description: This is the selling area for the current session. Actual selling will be implemented in the next phase.

sell.title: Sales screen
sell.emptyProductsDescription: Add products to product_templates or change the current search.
sell.closedTitle: Session is not available for selling
sell.closedDescription: Sales can only be processed on an open session.

cart.title: Current order
cart.empty: Choose products to start the order.

operations.title: Operations log
operations.empty: No sales operations have been recorded in this session yet.

payment.title: Payment
payment.description: Choose a payment method and confirm the amount to collect this order.

validation.amount: Enter a valid amount that covers the order total.

messages.loadError: Unable to load the sales screen.
messages.sessionClosed: This session is closed or not valid for selling.
messages.emptyCart: Add at least one product before payment.
messages.noPaymentMethods: No payment methods are available for this POS.

form.title: Add POS location
form.description: Create a new selling point for daily sales operations.
form.name: POS name

messages.createError: Unable to add the POS location.
messages.openSessionExists: This POS already has an open session.
messages.userMissing: Unable to identify the current user.

sidebar.foundationDescription: Auth, onboarding, workspace awareness, and modular screens are ready for backend wiring.

system.notFoundTitle: This page is not part of the workspace.
system.notFoundDescription: The route may have moved, or it may not exist yet in this SaaS foundation.

errors.workspaceLoad: Unable to load your tenant bootstrap.
errors.workspaceAuthMissing: No authenticated user found for workspace bootstrap.
errors.authSessionCheck: Unable to check your current session.
errors.authSignIn: Unable to sign in right now.
errors.authSignUp: Unable to create your account right now.
errors.supabaseConfig: Missing or invalid Supabase environment variables: VITE_SUPABASE_URL and VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY.
errors.teamCreate: Unable to create the employee right now.
